codex_response:
Implemented `task_332202d5`. The rule is: rows with the special-column `1` are markers; in the output those rows become all `1`s with the special column restored to `8`, and every other row is filled by the nearest marker color, with an all-`1` separator only on exact ties between different marker colors. Both summary hints matched the official examples, so I used them as a starting hypothesis; no `notes.md` or new primitive was needed.
